# Provenance — Project-Aligned Finance design (2026-06-03)

**Generated by:** dynamic Workflow `wf_a8df813a-91f` (5 agents: 1 internal codebase audit + 3 external research streams [Xero project alignment · API/sync stack · weekly-report patterns] + 1 synthesis). ~327K subagent tokens, 49 tool uses.

## Verified vs inferred

- **External best-practice / API / reporting claims** — sourced to the real URLs in the doc's Sources section. Research agents were instructed to cite only URLs they actually opened and to omit rather than fabricate. Treat as **verified-to-source** (a cited third party said it), not verified-against-ACT.
- **Internal "Where we are" + dollar figures** — produced by a codebase-reading agent (Read/Grep), **NOT a live DB query this run**. Figures carried in from code comments / prior-session memory:
  - `~$486K General Expenses (incl. ~$144K TFN)`, `75 project codes`, `~71% of income in locked periods`, `~$55K real R&D basis (81% of the flag was drawings)` — all **inferred/unverified as of 2026-06-03**. Re-query the live ledger before quoting any of these in an external report (funder, board, R&D).
- **Xero hard ceilings** (no Bank Rules API, no reconcile API, 2 tracking categories, 60/min·5000/day) — **verified** against Xero Developer docs + uservoice (cited), and consistent with this repo's prior verified findings.

## Explicit unverified flags (carried in the doc)

1. **GHL contact-edit → Xero sync** — native connector is import-only on connect; ongoing edit sync needs Zapier/Make. Not confirmed present in the ACT stack.
2. **`finance/budgets.ts` + `finance/pipeline-rollup.ts`** named as report data sources — confirm these modules exist before wiring the graphs.
3. **Xero Projects API** — listed as "unverified-in-use"; ACT uses tracking categories, not Xero Projects.

## Reproducibility

Re-run / iterate: `Workflow({ scriptPath: "<session>/workflows/scripts/project-aligned-finance-design-wf_a8df813a-91f.js", resumeFromRunId: "wf_a8df813a-91f" })` — completed agents return cached; edit the script to change scope.

## Status

Design / discussion artifact. The tagging protocol (§2) and Pty-cutover hooks (§5) should graduate to `wiki/concepts/` + the entity-migration ledger once agreed with Ben/SL. Not a committed build plan yet.
